allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, re, html; t = sys.stdin.read\(\); texts = re.findall\(r'<w:t[^>]*>\([^<]*\)</w:t>', t\); [print\(html.unescape\(x\)\) for x in texts if x.strip\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps = {**d.get\('dependencies', {}\), **d.get\('devDependencies', {}\)}; [print\(k, v\) for k, v in deps.items\(\)]")
